Metadata.title: OpenNext Landing
Metadata.description: A professional bilingual company homepage built with Next.js and cookie-based localization.

HomePage.title: A clear, credible homepage for a modern professional website.
HomePage.description: Present your company with a familiar structure that feels trustworthy: strong headline, focused services, a simple process, measurable results, and a direct call to action.
HomePage.cardDescription: This layout removes the app-style chrome and replaces it with a standard company homepage flow visitors expect.
HomePage.highlightTitle: It communicates value quickly and keeps the next step obvious.
HomePage.highlightDescription: Visitors can understand what the business offers, how the team works, and where to click next without navigating a dashboard-like shell.
HomePage.featureOneDescription: Hero copy, service summaries, and supporting proof are ordered like a conventional professional site.
HomePage.featureTwoDescription: Sections now flow from offer to process to outcomes, which makes the page easier to scan and trust.
HomePage.featureThreeDescription: The existing cookie-based language setup stays intact, so English and Indonesian still share the same page URL.
HomePage.proofDescription: Primary calls to action are repeated in the header, hero, and closing section so contact intent has a clear path.
HomePage.servicesTitle: The core offers are simple to understand.
HomePage.servicesDescription: A professional homepage should clarify the business quickly. These sections introduce the main services without overwhelming the visitor.
HomePage.serviceOneDescription: Align messaging, offers, and customer journeys so the website speaks with clarity from the first screen.
HomePage.serviceTwoDescription: Create polished marketing pages that balance brand credibility, responsive design, and practical conversion goals.
HomePage.serviceThreeDescription: Improve performance after launch with content updates, UX refinements, and measurable iteration based on results.
HomePage.processTitle: A simple working model clients immediately recognize.
HomePage.processDescription: The process section explains how engagement works without forcing visitors to infer it from product-style UI patterns.
HomePage.processOneDescription: Start with business goals, audience needs, and the pages that matter most to the buying journey.
HomePage.processTwoDescription: Turn strategy into polished page structure, refined copy hierarchy, and production-ready interface decisions.
HomePage.processThreeDescription: Launch a responsive site with localization support, clear calls to action, and room for future expansion.
HomePage.resultsTitle: Support the story with concrete outcomes.
HomePage.resultsDescription: A standard company homepage typically pairs services with a few proof points. These metric blocks provide that familiar signal.
HomePage.resultOneDescription: Clearer positioning and stronger CTA placement help the right prospects take action earlier.
HomePage.resultTwoDescription: Visitors stay longer when the page looks like a professional website instead of an internal product surface.
HomePage.contactTitle: Ready to turn this into your actual company homepage?
HomePage.contactDescription: The structure is now in place for a conventional professional landing page. Swap in your real brand copy, case studies, and contact details next.

Shell.sidebarTitle: A familiar menu for a standard marketing website.
Shell.sidebarDescription: Mobile visitors now get direct section links and a clear contact action instead of a dashboard-style sidebar.
Shell.servicesDescription: Overview of the main offers highlighted on the homepage.
Shell.processDescription: How the team works from discovery through delivery.
Shell.resultsDescription: Proof points and outcomes that reinforce credibility.
Shell.footerTitle: A cleaner public-facing structure for the landing experience.
Shell.footerDescription: The homepage now sits inside a conventional website frame with a top navigation bar, focused content sections, and a footer built for marketing pages.
